title: Hadoop MapReduce Committer Stage Directory
description: The 'lib/output/committer' directory manages Hadoop MapReduce's commit protocol, ensuring data consistency. It contains 'manifest' subdirectory with files like 'AbstractJobOrTaskStage.java' and 'JobOrTaskStage.java', defining process stages. 'LoadManifestsStage.java' processes task manifests, showcasing a layered architecture. This directory exemplifies modular design, where components collaborate for reliable data processing. The 'manifest' subdirectory tracks and verifies task completion, ensuring data integrity in MapReduce.
